     1→<!DOCTYPE html>
     2→<html lang="en">
     3→<head>
     4→<meta charset="UTF-8"/>
     5→<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1.0"/>
     6→<title>XII NOON — Ultra-Luxury Timekeeping</title>
     7→<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com"/>
     8→<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,500;0,600;1,300;1,400&family=Jost:wght@200;300;400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
     9→<style>
    10→:root{
    11→  --black:#080704; --deep:#0e0c08; --gold:#c9a84c; --gold-light:#e8c97a;
    12→  --cream:#f0e8d5; --cream-dk:#c8b98a; --white:#faf8f3;
    13→  --serif:'Cormorant Garamond',Georgia,serif; --sans:'Jost',sans-serif;
    14→}
    15→*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0;}
    16→html{scrollbar-width:none;scroll-behavior:smooth;}
    17→html::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none;}
    18→body{background:var(--black);color:var(--cream);font-family:var(--sans);font-weight:300;overflow-x:hidden;cursor:none;}
    19→body::before{content:'';position:fixed;inset:0;
    20→  background-image:url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='n'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.85' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23n)'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");
    21→  opacity:0.025;pointer-events:none;z-index:999;}
    22→
    23→.cur{position:fixed;width:8px;height:8px;background:var(--gold);border-radius:50%;pointer-events:none;z-index:9999;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);mix-blend-mode:screen;transition:width .3s,height .3s;}
    24→.cur-ring{position:fixed;width:32px;height:32px;border:1px solid var(--gold);border-radius:50%;pointer-events:none;z-index:9998;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);opacity:.4;transition:width .3s,height .3s,opacity .3s;}
    25→
    26→nav{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:800;padding:28px 56px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;transition:background .5s,padding .4s,border-color .5s;border-bottom:1px solid transparent;}
    27→nav.sc{background:rgba(8,7,4,.92);backdrop-filter:blur(14px);padding:16px 56px;border-bottom-color:rgba(201,168,76,.15);}
    28→.nav-logo{display:flex;align-items:center;text-decoration:none;}
    29→.nav-links{display:flex;gap:34px;list-style:none;}
    30→.nav-links a{font-size:10px;font-weight:300;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--cream-dk);text-decoration:none;transition:color .3s;position:relative;}
    31→.nav-links a::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:-3px;left:0;width:0;height:1px;background:var(--gold);transition:width .4s;}
    32→.nav-links a:hover{color:var(--gold);}
    33→.nav-links a:hover::after{width:100%;}
    34→.nav-cta{font-size:10px;font-weight:300;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);text-decoration:none;border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.45);padding:10px 22px;transition:background .35s,color .35s;}
    35→.nav-cta:hover{background:var(--gold);color:var(--black);}
    36→@media(max-width:768px){nav{padding:18px 24px;} nav.sc{padding:12px 24px;} .nav-links{display:none;}}
    37→
    38→/* CINEMATIC SCRUB SECTIONS */
    39→.cinematic{position:relative;}
    40→.cinematic .sticky{position:sticky;top:0;height:100vh;width:100%;overflow:hidden;display:grid;place-items:center;background:#05040200;}
    41→.cinematic canvas{position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;filter:saturate(1.04) contrast(1.02);}
    42→.vignette{position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;
    43→  background:
    44→    radial-gradient(100% 75% at 50% 50%,rgba(0,0,0,.28) 15%,rgba(0,0,0,.72) 100%),
    45→    linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(0,0,0,.7) 0%,rgba(0,0,0,.22) 25%,rgba(0,0,0,.22) 70%,rgba(0,0,0,.92) 100%);}
    46→
    47→.overlay-copy{position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:10;pointer-events:none;text-align:center;}
    48→.reveal-line{position:absolute;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);width:max-content;max-width:88vw;opacity:0;will-change:opacity,transform;transition:opacity .12s ease,transform .12s ease;}
    49→.reveal-line.headline{top:50%;font-family:var(--serif);font-size:clamp(46px,8vw,108px);font-weight:300;color:#fff;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;line-height:.95;text-shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.95),0 6px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.9),0 16px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.75),0 0 100px rgba(0,0,0,.6);transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);}
    50→.reveal-line.headline em{font-style:italic;color:var(--gold-light);}
    51→.reveal-line.sub{top:calc(50% + clamp(48px,7vw,90px));font-family:var(--sans);font-size:clamp(10px,1.1vw,13px);font-weight:300;letter-spacing:.36em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#fff;text-shadow:0 1px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.95),0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.85),0 0 40px rgba(0,0,0,.6);transform:translateX(-50%);}
    52→.reveal-line.quote{top:50%;font-family:var(--serif);font-style:italic;font-size:clamp(16px,2vw,24px);font-weight:300;color:#fff;line-height:1.6;max-width:600px;text-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.95),0 8px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.8);transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);background:rgba(0,0,0,.22);backdrop-filter:blur(2px);padding:24px 32px;border-left:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.35);}
    53→.reveal-line.gold-word{top:50%;font-family:var(--serif);font-size:clamp(54px,9vw,116px);font-weight:300;color:transparent;letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase;line-height:.9;-webkit-text-stroke:1.4px rgba(232,201,122,.9);text-shadow:none;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);filter:drop-shadow(0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.7)) drop-shadow(0 0 36px rgba(201,168,76,.35));}
    54→
    55→.hud-corner{position:absolute;z-index:15;font-size:10px;font-weight:300;letter-spacing:.22em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(201,168,76,.5);}
    56→.hud-tl{top:88px;left:40px;} .hud-tr{top:88px;right:40px;text-align:right;}
    57→.hud-bl{bottom:56px;left:40px;} .hud-br{bottom:56px;right:40px;text-align:right;}
    58→.progress-wrap{position:absolute;bottom:36px;left:40px;right:40px;height:1px;background:rgba(201,168,76,.12);z-index:15;}
    59→.progress-fill{height:100%;width:0%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--gold),transparent);transition:width .05s;}
    60→.scroll-hint-txt{position:absolute;bottom:12px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.35em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(201,168,76,.45);z-index:15;animation:bob 2s ease-in-out infinite;transition:opacity .4s;}
    61→@keyframes bob{0%,100%{transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(5px)}}
    62→@media(max-width:768px){.hud-corner{font-size:8px;} .hud-tl,.hud-tr{top:72px;}}
    63→
    64→/* MARQUEE */
    65→.marquee-strip{border-top:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.12);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.12);padding:14px 0;overflow:hidden;background:rgba(201,168,76,.03);}
    66→.marquee-inner{display:flex;white-space:nowrap;animation:marquee 32s linear infinite;}
    67→.marquee-inner:hover{animation-play-state:paused;}
    68→.marquee-item{font-size:10px;font-weight:300;letter-spacing:.25em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(201,168,76,.7);padding:0 28px;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:28px;}
    69→.marquee-item::after{content:'◇';font-size:8px;color:rgba(201,168,76,.4);}
    70→@keyframes marquee{0%{transform:translateX(0)}100%{transform:translateX(-50%)}}
    71→
    72→/* PHILOSOPHY — content unchanged from source site */
    73→.philosophy{padding:120px 0;background:var(--deep);}
    74→.section-inner{max-width:1160px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 48px;}
    75→.philosophy-intro{text-align:center;max-width:600px;margin:0 auto 80px;}
    76→.philosophy-intro .eyebrow{font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.3em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:16px;}
    77→.philosophy-intro p{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:22px;font-style:italic;color:rgba(240,232,213,.5);line-height:1.7;}
    78→.philosophy-pillars{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:1px;background:rgba(201,168,76,.1);border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.1);}
    79→.pillar{background:var(--deep);padding:52px 40px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;transition:background .5s;}
    80→.pillar::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--gold),transparent);transform:scaleX(0);transition:transform .6s ease;}
    81→.pillar:hover{background:rgba(201,168,76,.04);}
    82→.pillar:hover::before{transform:scaleX(1);}
    83→.pillar-title{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:24px;font-weight:400;color:var(--cream);letter-spacing:.02em;}
    84→.pillar-sub{font-family:var(--serif);font-style:italic;font-size:15px;color:rgba(201,168,76,.65);margin-top:8px;}
    85→@media(max-width:768px){.philosophy-pillars{grid-template-columns:1fr;}}
    86→
    87→/* COLLECTION — 4 products, real copy */
    88→.collection{padding:110px 0;background:var(--black);}
    89→.col-header{margin-bottom:56px;}
    90→.col-header .eyebrow{font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.32em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:14px;}
    91→.col-header h2{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:clamp(36px,5vw,58px);font-weight:300;color:#fff;line-height:1;}
    92→.col-header .deck{font-family:var(--serif);font-style:italic;font-size:16px;color:rgba(201,168,76,.55);margin-top:10px;}
    93→.grid-2x2{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:2px;background:rgba(201,168,76,.06);}
    94→.card{position:relative;overflow:hidden;background:#0c0b07;cursor:none;}
    95→.card-img{width:100%;height:380px;object-fit:cover;object-position:center;display:block;transition:transform .9s cubic-bezier(.25,.46,.45,.94);}
    96→.card:hover .card-img{transform:scale(1.05);}
    97→.card-body{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;padding:30px 28px;background:linear-gradient(to top,rgba(8,7,4,1) 0%,rgba(8,7,4,.82) 42%,transparent 100%);transform:translateY(6px);transition:transform .5s;}
    98→.card:hover .card-body{transform:translateY(0);}
    99→.card-type{font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.28em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:7px;}
   100→.card-name{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:27px;font-weight:300;color:#fff;margin-bottom:8px;}
   101→.card-desc{font-size:12px;font-weight:300;color:rgba(255,255,255,.68);line-height:1.7;margin-bottom:14px;max-width:340px;}
   102→.card-link{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.22em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);text-decoration:none;transition:gap .3s;}
   103→.card-link:hover{gap:14px;}
   104→@media(max-width:768px){.grid-2x2{grid-template-columns:1fr;} .card-img{height:300px;}}
   105→
   106→/* CRAFTSMANSHIP STRIP (between scrub 2 and Stand For) */
   107→.craft-text{padding:110px 0;background:var(--deep);}
   108→.craft-inner{max-width:760px;margin:0 auto;text-align:center;padding:0 40px;}
   109→.craft-text .eyebrow{font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.32em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:18px;}
   110→.craft-text h2{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:clamp(32px,4.5vw,52px);font-weight:300;color:#fff;line-height:1.1;margin-bottom:28px;}
   111→.craft-text p{font-size:14px;font-weight:300;color:rgba(240,232,213,.65);line-height:1.9;margin-bottom:18px;}
   112→.craft-text .btn-ghost{margin-top:20px;}
   113→
   114→/* WHAT WE STAND FOR — content unchanged */
   115→.standards{padding:110px 0;background:var(--black);}
   116→.standards .eyebrow{text-align:center;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.32em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:14px;}
   117→.standards h2{text-align:center;font-family:var(--serif);font-size:clamp(34px,4.5vw,54px);font-weight:300;color:#fff;margin-bottom:64px;}
   118→.pillars-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:1px;background:rgba(201,168,76,.1);border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.1);max-width:1000px;margin:0 auto;}
   119→.pillar-card{background:var(--black);padding:48px 36px;text-align:center;}
   120→.pillar-numeral{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:48px;font-weight:300;color:rgba(201,168,76,.2);display:block;margin-bottom:16px;}
   121→.pillar-name{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:26px;font-weight:400;color:var(--cream);margin-bottom:12px;}
   122→.pillar-desc{font-size:13px;font-weight:300;color:rgba(201,168,76,.55);line-height:1.7;}
   123→@media(max-width:768px){.pillars-row{grid-template-columns:1fr;}}
   124→
   125→/* ENQUIRY */
   126→.enquiry{padding:130px 0;background:var(--deep);text-align:center;border-top:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.08);}
   127→.enquiry-inner{max-width:640px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 40px;}
   128→.diamond{width:10px;height:10px;background:var(--gold);transform:rotate(45deg);margin:0 auto 40px;box-shadow:0 0 24px rgba(201,168,76,.35);}
   129→.enquiry h2{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:clamp(34px,5vw,58px);font-weight:300;color:#fff;line-height:1.05;margin-bottom:18px;}
   130→.enquiry p{font-size:13px;font-weight:300;color:rgba(201,168,76,.55);line-height:1.85;margin-bottom:44px;}
   131→.btn-gold{font-size:10px;font-weight:300;letter-spacing:.22em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--black);background:var(--gold);border:none;padding:15px 36px;text-decoration:none;display:inline-block;transition:background .3s,letter-spacing .35s;cursor:none;}
   132→.btn-gold:hover{background:var(--gold-light);letter-spacing:.28em;}
   133→.btn-ghost{font-size:10px;font-weight:300;letter-spacing:.22em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--cream-dk);border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.3);padding:15px 36px;text-decoration:none;display:inline-block;transition:color .3s,border-color .3s;cursor:none;margin-left:14px;}
   134→.btn-ghost:hover{color:#fff;border-color:rgba(201,168,76,.7);}
   135→.enquiry-note{margin-top:26px;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(201,168,76,.28);}
   136→
   137→/* FOOTER */
   138→footer{border-top:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.1);padding:56px 56px 32px;background:var(--black);}
   139→.footer-inner{max-width:1160px;margin:0 auto;}
   140→.footer-top{display:grid;grid-template-columns:2fr 1fr 1fr;gap:48px;margin-bottom:40px;padding-bottom:40px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.07);}
   141→.footer-brand{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:20px;font-weight:400;letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#fff;margin-bottom:14px;}
   142→.footer-tag{font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.1em;color:rgba(201,168,76,.35);line-height:1.9;font-weight:300;}
   143→.footer-col-title{font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.28em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(201,168,76,.4);margin-bottom:18px;font-weight:300;}
   144→.footer-links{list-style:none;}
   145→.footer-links li{margin-bottom:10px;}
   146→.footer-links a{font-size:13px;font-weight:300;color:rgba(201,168,76,.4);text-decoration:none;transition:color .3s;}
   147→.footer-links a:hover{color:var(--cream);}
   148→.footer-bottom{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;}
   149→.footer-quote{font-family:var(--serif);font-style:italic;font-size:13px;color:rgba(201,168,76,.28);}
   150→.footer-copy{font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(201,168,76,.18);}
   151→@media(max-width:768px){footer{padding:40px 24px 24px;} .footer-top{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:28px;}}
   152→
   153→.reveal{opacity:0;transform:translateY(28px);transition:opacity .9s ease,transform .9s ease;}
   154→.reveal.in{opacity:1;transform:none;}
   155→.reveal-d1{transition-delay:.15s;} .reveal-d2{transition-delay:.3s;} .reveal-d3{transition-delay:.45s;}
   156→</style>
   157→</head>
   158→<body>
   159→
   160→<div class="cur" id="cur"></div>
   161→<div class="cur-ring" id="cur-ring"></div>
   162→
   163→<nav id="main-nav">
   164→  <a href="#" class="nav-logo"><img src="data:image/webp;base64," alt="XII Noon" style="height:42px;width:auto;display:block;"/></a>
   165→  <ul class="nav-links">
   166→    <li><a href="#collection">Collection</a></li>
   167→    <li><a href="#craft">Brand Story</a></li>
   168→    <li><a href="#enquiry">Private Enquiry</a></li>
   169→  </ul>
   170→  <a href="#enquiry" class="nav-cta">Private Enquiry</a>
   171→</nav>
   172→
   173→<!-- ═══ HOMEPAGE HERO, AS CINEMATIC SCRUB (Emirati footage, homepage copy) ═══ -->
   174→<section class="cinematic" id="s-hero" style="height:620vh;">
   175→  <div class="sticky">
   176→    <canvas id="canvas-1"></canvas>
   177→    <div class="vignette"></div>
   178→    <div class="overlay-copy">
   179→      <!-- BEAT 1 (0.00–0.16): eyebrow + headline together as ONE unit, both centered as a block -->
   180→      <div class="reveal-line headline" data-in="0.00" data-out="0.16" style="top:calc(50% - 18px);">
   181→        XII Noon
   182→      </div>
   183→      <div class="reveal-line sub" data-in="0.00" data-out="0.16" style="top:calc(50% + clamp(54px,7vw,84px));">
   184→        Make with India &nbsp;·&nbsp; For the World
   185→      </div>
   186→
   187→      <!-- gap 0.16–0.20: clear screen -->
   188→
   189→      <!-- BEAT 2 (0.20–0.36): solo subtitle line -->
   190→      <div class="reveal-line sub" data-in="0.20" data-out="0.36" style="top:50%;">
   191→        Ultra-Luxury Timekeeping &nbsp;·&nbsp; Since the Beginning of Time
   192→      </div>
   193→
   194→      <!-- gap 0.36–0.42 -->
   195→
   196→      <!-- BEAT 3 (0.42–0.62): quote, solo -->
   197→      <div class="reveal-line quote" data-in="0.42" data-out="0.62">
   198→        "Not a response to the world of luxury —<br>India's assertion within it."
   199→      </div>
   200→
   201→      <!-- gap 0.62–0.70 -->
   202→
   203→      <!-- BEAT 4 (0.70–0.86): ghost word, solo -->
   204→      <div class="reveal-line gold-word" data-in="0.70" data-out="0.86">
   205→        Sovereign
   206→      </div>
   207→
   208→      <!-- gap 0.86–0.92 -->
   209→
   210→      <!-- BEAT 5 (0.92–1.00): closing headline, solo -->
   211→      <div class="reveal-line headline" data-in="0.92" data-out="1.00">
   212→        The <em>Emirati</em><br>Edition
   213→      </div>
   214→    </div>
   215→    <div class="hud-corner hud-tl">XII Noon</div>
   216→    <div class="hud-corner hud-tr">Ultra-Luxury Timekeeping</div>
   217→    <div class="hud-corner hud-bl" id="frame-readout-1">Frame 001 · 130</div>
   218→    <div class="hud-corner hud-br">Make with India</div>
   219→    <div class="progress-wrap"><div class="progress-fill" id="p1"></div></div>
   220→    <div class="scroll-hint-txt" id="scroll-hint-1">Scroll ▾</div>
   221→  </div>
   222→</section>
   223→
   224→<!-- ═══ MARQUEE — exact site copy ═══ -->
   225→<div class="marquee-strip">
   226→  <div class="marquee-inner">
   227→    <span class="marquee-item">Tricolor Edition</span><span class="marquee-item">Vajra Pen</span>
   228→    <span class="marquee-item">Make with India for the World</span><span class="marquee-item">Timekeeping as Legacy</span>
   229→    <span class="marquee-item">Emirati Edition</span>
   230→    <span class="marquee-item">Tricolor Edition</span><span class="marquee-item">Vajra Pen</span>
   231→    <span class="marquee-item">Make with India for the World</span><span class="marquee-item">Timekeeping as Legacy</span>
   232→    <span class="marquee-item">Emirati Edition</span>
   233→    <span class="marquee-item">Tricolor Edition</span><span class="marquee-item">Vajra Pen</span>
   234→    <span class="marquee-item">Make with India for the World</span><span class="marquee-item">Timekeeping as Legacy</span>
   235→    <span class="marquee-item">Emirati Edition</span>
   236→  </div>
   237→</div>
   238→
   239→<!-- ═══ PHILOSOPHY — UNCHANGED CONTENT ═══ -->
   240→<section class="philosophy" id="philosophy">
   241→  <div class="section-inner">
   242→    <div class="philosophy-intro reveal">
   243→      <p class="eyebrow">Philosophy</p>
   244→      <p>This is not timekeeping as function.</p>
   245→    </div>
   246→    <div class="philosophy-pillars">
   247→      <div class="pillar reveal reveal-d1">
   248→        <h3 class="pillar-title">Production</h3>
   249→        <p class="pillar-sub">Is Restricted</p>
   250→      </div>

   363→<!-- ═══ CRAFTSMANSHIP TEXT — exact site copy ═══ -->
   364→<section class="craft-text" id="craft">
   365→  <div class="craft-inner">
   366→    <p class="eyebrow reveal">Craftsmanship</p>
   367→    <h2 class="reveal reveal-d1">Every dial tells a story<br>older than the brand itself.</h2>
   368→    <p class="reveal reveal-d2">XII NOON draws from the visual grammar of Bharat — architectural precision, legacy symbolism, ceremonial geometry — translated into horology with uncompromising exactitude.</p>
   369→    <p class="reveal reveal-d2">Each timepiece undergoes over 400 hours of handwork. No two are identical. Every stone is hand-set by a master lapidary.</p>
   370→    <a href="https://xiinoon.in/brand-story" class="btn-ghost reveal reveal-d3">Our Story</a>
   371→  </div>
   372→</section>

   374→<!-- ═══ WHAT WE STAND FOR — UNCHANGED CONTENT ═══ -->
   375→<section class="standards">
   376→  <div class="section-inner">
   377→    <p class="eyebrow reveal">What We Stand For</p>
   378→    <h2 class="reveal reveal-d1">The XII Noon Standard</h2>
   379→    <div class="pillars-row">
   380→      <div class="pillar-card reveal reveal-d1">
   381→        <span class="pillar-numeral">I</span>
   382→        <h3 class="pillar-name">Sovereignty</h3>
   383→        <p class="pillar-desc">Born in Bharat. Rooted in centuries of craft, symbolism, and ceremonial authority.</p>
   384→      </div>
   385→      <div class="pillar-card reveal reveal-d2">
   386→        <span class="pillar-numeral">II</span>
   387→        <h3 class="pillar-name">Scarcity</h3>
   388→        <p class="pillar-desc">Production is intentionally restricted. Possession is never offered — it is extended.</p>
   389→      </div>
   390→      <div class="pillar-card reveal reveal-d3">
   391→        <span class="pillar-numeral">III</span>
   392→        <h3 class="pillar-name">Legacy</h3>
   393→        <p class="pillar-desc">Every XII NOON creation is designed to be inherited, not merely owned. Permanence is the point.</p>
   394→      </div>
   395→    </div>
   396→  </div>
